payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Tall dark brown wooden cabinet door with a recessed central panel and glossy wood-veneer finish; image shows the door edge-cropped and filling most of the frame, with visible vertical grain and a few faint scuffs; no hardware visible — approximate distance ~1.2 m.
